name: 影分身脆弱
description: 影分身受到任何伤害时立即消散（无视血量）
skillCode: var clone = context.rulePiece; if (!clone) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.sourcePiece || context.sourcePiece.instanceId !== clone.instanceId) return { success: false, message: '' }; if (!context.damage || context.damage <= 0) return { success: false, message: '' }; clone.currentHp = 0; return { success: true, message: clone.name + '（影分身）受到伤害，立即消散' };
